[A] I am looking for a Chinese place in the centre.
[B] I have 10 restaurants matching your request. Did you have a price range you would like?
[A] No, it doesn't matter.
[B] Would you like for it to have a certain number of stars?
[A] No just book at a chinese place in the centre. I need a table for 4 at 15:00 on wednesday please.
[B] I have you at Jinling Noodle bar then, reference is OCNH3CJJ . Anything else you need?
[A] No that is it. Thank you.
[B] Have a great day!

[A] i want to book a taxi. The taxi should leave after 02:30 and should go to Norwich train station.
[B] I can definitely help you with that. Where will you be departing from?
[A] I will be departing from jesus college.
[B] I have booked you a grey Audi. The contact number is 07597249308. What else may I help you with?
[A] that's is all i wanted for today, thanks
[B] Thanks and have a nice day.

[A] I'm looking for an expensive restaurant in the city centre.
[B] I can most definitely help with that. Is there a certain type of food you would like to try?
[A] Yes, I think I would like to try French food.
[B] Cote is a French restaurant in the centre of town. It is expensive. Would you like me to book you a reservation?
[A] Yes. Please send be the phone number, address and postcode.
[B] Their number is 01223311053, postcard is cb21uf and they are located on Bridge Street City Centre.
[A] Great, thanks. I also need a train. I need to leave cambridge after 12:15.
[B] I have over 800 possible matches for that request. Where will you be departing from?
[A] I am leaving from Kings Lynn on Saturday.
[B] I have a train TR4003 leaving cambride at 13:00 and arriving at london kings cross at 13:51. Would you like me to make reservations?
[A] Yes, can you book that train for 2 people please?
[B] Your train has been booked. Reference number CYW95CE2 . Is there anything else I can help you with?
[A] No, thank you. That is all I need today.
[B] I am happy to be able to help. Have a nice day. Goodbye.

[A] I want to know where I would find the Parkside Police Station. Could you tell me?
[B] Their postcode is CB11JG, you can reach them at phone number 01223358966.
[A] Thank you. May I have a street address for the police station?
[B] Certainly. Their address is Parkside, Cambridge. Can I assist you further?
[A] Thank you goodbye
[B] welcome. at your service next time

[A] I am looking for a place to stay in the moderate price range. It must include free parking.
[B] Is there a specific part of town you would like to stay in?
[A] I would prefer to stay in a 2 star hotel in the north.
[B] The Ashley hotel is a 2 star hotel in the north with free parking in the moderate price range. I can book this for you.
[A] That would be great! Can you let me know what the post code is? Thank you!
[B] The postcode is cb41er. How long would you like to stay and how many should I book the hotel for?
[A] I don't need to book it at this time. Can you help me find a place to visit while I'm in town? I'd like a swimming pool in the North.
[B] We list two swimming pools in the north area, jesus green outdoor pool and kings hedges learner pool. Would you like more information on either of those?
[A] Can you give me the phone number and postcode for the Jesus Green pool, please?
[B] Sure, the phone number is 01223302579 and the postcode is cb43px. Can I help with anything else today?
[A] No that is all thank you.
[B] Thank you, goodbye.

[A] I would like information on the Gonville hotel.
[B] The gonville hotel is in the city centre. It is expensive, and has 3 stars. Free internet and parking. Address is gonville place. Can I get you a booking?
[A] Sure, I need a reservation for 4 people and 3 nights starting on Saturday.
[B] I was able to reserve that for you. Your reference number is 28PZGFFT .
[A] Thank you so much!
[B] Thank you. Is there anything else?
[A] Are there any expensive thai paces in the area?
[B] There is bangkok city in the centre would you like me to make you a reservation?
[A] Is that in the west?
[B] It is in the centre, not the west.
[A] I need something in the West
[B] Sala thong is a great thai restaurant on the west side located at 35 Newnham Road Newnham. Do you need any more information?
[A] What postcode is that?
[B] cb39ey. What else may I do for you?
[A] I also need a taxi that will leave the restaurant by 09:15
[B] Okay, what time do you need to leave?
[A] I need to leave the restaurant by 09:15 to go the hotel. Can you book a taxi for me?
[B] Booking completed! Booked car type : yellow volvo Contact number : 07044362431 Can I help with anything else?
[A] No that's it, thank you.
[B] Thanks again for using our service, enjoy your stay!

[A] i'm looking for a train to cambridge
[B] I'd love to help! Which day were you wanting to leave?
[A] I'm leaving on Sunday
[B] What station do you want to leave from?
[A] I need a train from broxbourne.
[B] I have many trains on that day. Do you have a preferred time for leaving or arriving?
[A] Yes, I'd like to leave for cambridge after 13:30 on sunday.
[B] TR4813 leaves at 14:32 and arrive an hour later. How does that sound?
[A] That sounds great. I'll need 7 tickets.
[B] Your booking was successful. The total fee is 100.24 GBP, which is payable at the station. Your reference number is ALFLIJMY . Is there anything else I can help you with?
[A] Yeah, can to tell me about colleges in the centre of town?
[B] There are 13 colleges located in the centre. Are you looking for somewhere with free entrance or is somewhere with a fee okay too?
[A] it doesn't matter. could you provide the postcode, phone number, and address for one that you suggest?
[B] Sure! I suggest Downing College. I is located on Regent Street in the postcode CB21DQ. Their phone number is 01223334860.
[A] That should be it for today thanks!
[B] You're welcome. Goodbye

[A] Hi, I'm looking to book a train out of Cambridge that I want to arrive in Ely. Can you assist me with finding times and dates?
[B] There are 70 trains traveling to Ely from Cambridge between Friday and Wednesday. What day do you want to travel?
[A] I would like to leave on Saturday.
[B] You could take TR8860 early Saturday at 05:50. It's a short trip of 17 minutes and costs 3.52 pounds. Will this work for you?
[A] Can you book that one for 6 people?
[B] Yes, I have made the booking for you. Your reference number is 1K560JNY .
[A] I also need a place to eat, I would like it in the west and expensive.
[B] There are 9 expensive restaurants in the west. Are you looking for a particular type of food?
[A] Yes. British food please.
[B] I have two. Shall I book one for you?
[A] Yes, I need a table for 6 people at 10:30 on Saturday and please provide the reference number after booking is completed.
[B] What day do you want it for, before I confirm the booking?
[A] The same day, saturday.
[B] Booking was successful. The table will be reserved for 15 minutes. Reference number is : XEP4E22B . Will there be anything else today?
[A] Thank you, thats all I need today.
[B] Glad I could help, hope you have a great trip!

[A] Currently planning to come out there but need to find a train that leaves after 15:30 and that will depart from Norwich.
[B] What day do you want to travel on?
[A] I would like to leave on Monday.
[B] I do not have a train that leaves by 15:30 on that day but soon after at 16:16. Would this work for you?
[A] Yes. I will need two tickets.
[B] Al set, your reference number is ZIY4Y3CA, the cost is 17.60 pounds per person payable at the station.
[A] Can I also get information on wandlebury country park.
[B] Yes, wandlebury country park is located at wandlebury ring, gog magog hills, babraham, with phone #01223243830. Would you like any other information?
[A] That is all that I needed. Thank you so much for the assistance.
[B] You are welcome. Please comeback if we can do anything more for you!
[A] I will. Thanks again. Good-bye.
[B] My pleasure. Enjoy your time in Cambridge. Goodbye.

[A] Is there a cheap restaurant in the north part of town?
[B] May I suggest Royal Spice, a cheap Indian restaurant in the north?
[A] Is there anything else?
[B] Da Vinci Pizzeria is a cheap italian restraunt in the north area of town.
[A] What is the address and phone number?
[B] Da Vinci Pizzeria is at 20 Milton Road Chesterton, and their phone number is 01223 351707.
[A] Thank you goodbye.
[B] Thank you and goodbye!

[A] I need a hotel in the center of town with a star of 0.
[B] I have 2 with 0 stars. One is cheap the other is moderately priced. Do you have a preference?
[A] I would like the moderately priced hotel.
[B] How about cityroomz? They have free internet.
[A] Yes,address and phone number please ?
[B] The address is sleeperz hotel, station road cb12tz and the phone number is 01223304050. Is there anything else I can help you with?
[A] I would like to book that for 2 nights from Friday for 2 people.
[B] I'm sorry, that isn't available. Would you like me to try the other one, El Shaddai?
[A] Yes as long as it's in the same price range.
[B] I was able to book El Shaddai for 2, for two nights starting Friday. Your reference number is X7WHA1XL . Is there anything else I can help you with?
[A] No, that's fine. Thank you for your help.
[B] The address of hotel El Shaddai is 41 warkworth street cb11eg and the phone number is 01223327978.
[A] Have a nice day.
[B] Have a nice stay at the el shaddai. Thank you for contacting us and have a great day.

[A] I'm looking for unusual and expensive cuisine in the west. Do you have any suggestions?
[B] I didn't find any records matching those criteria.
[A] How about an Indian restaurant?
[B] There are several in the West area. What is your address and I can find one that is closest to you? Do you want to walk?
[A] I just want to go to one you think is best please
[B] You should definitely try Cocum. Can I reserve a table for you?
[A] Yes, please. I need a table for 4 people at 14:45 on Thursday. If not Thursday, I'd like the same time on Tuesday. Please send me the reference number.
[B] I was able to get you a table on Thursday, ref# XLUIM3SN . Is there anything else I can help you with today?
[A] No, you've been awesome thanks for all your help!
[B] I hope you enjoy your meal. Goodbye!

[A] Hello there. I was wondering if you could help me arrange for a taxi to take me from the Cherry Hinton Village Centre to La Raza?
[B] Certainly! Do you have an arrival or departure time in mind?
[A] I need to leave after 10:15. may i have the contact number for taxi please?
[B] Absolutely. The contact number is 07862333057
[A] Thank you very much!
[B] Would you like me to book the taxi?
[A] Yes I need the taxi to depart from the cherry hinton village and go to la raza. Leaving after 10:15. Please give me the contact number and car type.
[B] Okay, the taxi is booked. The contact number is 07862333057, the car will be a Blue Honda. Is there anything else I can help with?
[A] No, that will be all, thank you. Have a nice day.
[B] Thank you. We are always here to help with your bookings.

[A] i am new here. i need a place to stay with free wifi
[B] Okay! What price range are you looking for?
[A] cheaper the better free wifi too
[B] I have 10 locations with free wifi in the cheap price range. Do you have a particular area in mind?
[A] No particular area, whatever you suggest.
[B] Okay well I suggest the Alexander Bed and Breakfast in their center. Would you like me to make a booking for you?
[A] Yes please book 2 nights for 5 people, starting on Saturday.
[B] I have booked the Alexander Bed and Breakfast for 2 nights starting on Saturday for 5 people. The reference number is UCIOWNWV . Anything else I can help you with?
[A] That's it. Thank you, goodbye!
[B] Have a great day!

[A] I am looking for places to go in town centre. What are some options?

[A] What are the entrance fees for all those locations?
[B] The entrance fee is free for the museum is free, and the theater fee is unknown.
[A] Okay, thanks for that information. I would like to book a train as well. I'm leaving Tuesday after 16:00 from Cambridge.

[A] I'd like to go from stansted airport to Cambridge.

[B] Booking was successful, the total fee is 80.8 GBP payable at the station . Reference number is : VHL6TYDF .
[A] Thank you! Goodbye.
[B] You're welcome goodbye.

[B] You are more than welcome!

[A] Hi, what are some places to visit in Cambridge?

[A] I am looking for a swimming pool, in the east part of town.
[B] Sure, there is abbey pool and astroturf pitch in the east, address is pool way, whitehill road, off newmarket road. What else can I help with today?

[B] I don't have information on their entrance fee, but their phone number is 01223902088.
[A] I am also looking for a train leaving on Tuesday from Broxbourne after 17:15 headed to Cambridge.
[B] You have 7 trains, starting with TR6368 at 17:32. Would you like to book that one?
[A] What is the arrival time?
[B] Train TR6368 arrives in Cambridge by 18:32. Do you need anything else? I can help book a trip for you if you like.
[A] That'd be great, thank you.
[B] I'd be happy to book that for you. How many tickets will you need, just one?
[A] Just one please.
[B] I booked you on TR6368 at 17:32. Is there anything else I can help you with?
[A] That will be all, thank you.
[B] Thank you for choosing Cambridge TownInfo centre. Have a nice trip!

[A] I'm planning your trip in Cambridge.i'm looking for a place to dine in the east with chinese food

[B] The address is 529 Newmarket Road Fen Ditton. Is there anything else I can help you with?

[A] Okay that sounds great! Thanks for your help!

[A] cool, what's their phone number?

[A] Can I get their address as well?

[A] Hi there. Can you help me find a train leaving on Friday?
[B] Please tell me what town are you departing from and what is your destination?
[A] On Friday, I would like to arrive in Cambridge by 16:45.
[B] There are over 100 trains available, could you please provide a departure location?
[A] I would like to leave from london kings cross.
[B] ok I have one leaving by 05:17, TR5219, would that be fine?
[A] Do you have one that arrives a little closer to 16:45. I don't want to get in too early.
[B] TR8842 will get you there at 16:08. May I book it for you?
[A] Yes, I need it for 8 people. I'm also looking for a guesthouse type hotel with free parking in the moderate range.
[B] Do you have a preference for the number of stars or the area?
[A] May I have a reference number for that train, please?
[B] Your reference number is RRNTTR7Z . We also have quite a few guesthouses, do you have an area you'd like?
[A] For the guesthouse, do you have one in the moderate price range that includes free parking?
[B] There are 12 options for moderately priced guesthouses, any area preference?
[A] The area doesn't matter. I just need one with rooms available for 3 nights starting on Friday.
[B] For how many people?
[A] I need it to be for 2 people.
[B] The Acorn Guest House on 154 Chesterton Road should be sufficient, shall I reserve a room for you now?
[A] Yes, please, and I'll need the reference number.
[B] I was unable to book that room for you. Can we try a shorter stay or a different place perhaps?
[A] Sure, please try 2 nights.
[B] The booking was still unsuccessful. Would you like to try a different day?
[A] Could we please try a different hotel that is close to The Acorn Guest House?
[B] I checked with all 7 guesthouses in the north and none are available for even a one day stay starting Friday. Could we try a different day?
[A] Well I guess I'm out of luck, unless there are hotels in adjoining towns I could try.
[B] Sorry, we only work with places in cambridge.
[A] I am so sorry, can we start over with the guesthouse? I do need a moderate, but for 8 people. Still arriving Friday for 3 nights.
[B] I could not book a room for that number of nights on those days in that area. Perhaps try a different area?
[A] Please try 2 nights on Friday and see if that works. For a guesthouse, please.
[B] Your room is booked at acorn guest house for 8 people and 2 nights starting on Friday. Reference number is 3M1I4Q7S . Anything else I can help with?
[A] No, that should be all I need. Thanks for your help!
[B] It was a pleasure being of service. Enjoy your stay in Cambridge and call again if you need any further assistance. Goodbye!

[A] I need a hotel in the south
[B] The lensfield hotel is in the south. Do you want me to book it for you?
[A] does it include free parking?

[A] Thank you goodbye
[B] It's been my pleasure. Have a great stay in Cambridge.

[A] Can you find me a Chinese restaurant please?

[A] Am looking for the Addenbrookes Hospital.

[B] Thank you, Goodbye.

[A] Can you help me find a place to stay? I am looking for a hotel with a star of 0 and it needs free wifi.

[A] Any time after 20:45 is just fine with me. I'll just need the train ID - no booking today.

[A] Could you tell me the price of the train please?
[B] Yes, the cost is 17.60 pounds. Do you want to book it?
[A] Could you please tell me the travel time for that?
[B] Of course, the travel time is roughly 79 minutes.
[A] Ok, that's good. I would like to book that train please
[B] OK, how many tickets do you need?
[A] I don't need a ticket. I just needed to know. That'll be everything!
[B] Thank you, goodbye.

[A] Can you please help me find a guesthouse that offers free parking?

[B] The Acorn Guest House fits your criteria. It is located in the North. Would you like a reservation?
[A] No thank you. Would you give me the postcode?
[B] Sure can. The post code is cb41da. Anything else I can do for you today?
[A] That's all I needed to know. Thanks so much! Take care!
[B] You are welcome. Have a great day.
